title: SDPvP+
description: This is Modpack is for the Minecraft Players who loves PvP. Specially lots of potato pc players Doesnt gets more fps so i made this modpack for those who wants to play Minecraft without any problems
body:
This modpack is for the Minecraft Pvpers
It has all server and Fps boost mods like sodium and lithium.
It also makes your Minecraft Feel more smoother 
You can play this modpack vanilla and server both.
it doesnt effect minecraft vanilla system.
It is for Fps boost and Server side client
